badgePuppyDescription: First Wacken? Welcome to the pack.
badgePackMemberDescription: Wherever 10+ stray dogs gather, you're there.
badgePaisTropicalDescription: Brazil baby — sunshine, sweat, and heavy metal.
badgeDeutscherDescription: Ein Bier, bitte! You're playing on home turf.
badgeAmericaFuckYeahDescription: Coming again to save the motherfucking day, yeah!
badgeBelgaDescription: Trappist in the glass, double kicks in the chest — Belgium goes heavy.
badgeCafeteroDescription: Café fuerte, riffs más fuertes — Colombia abriendo el pogo.
badgeOGDescription: You were there when it all started. Eternal respect.
badgeMudSurvivorDescription: Survived the 2023 AND 2025 mud. Lived to tell the tale.
badge10WackensDescription: A decade of moshpits, beer, and metal — living legend.
badgeEarlyBirdDescription: 5+ bands before 1 PM — early riser alert.
badgeDreamerDescription: "I truly believe I can watch all of those!" — Dreamer
badgeDeathMetalDescription: You have death and destruction in you; your blood is probably black.
badgePowerMetalDescription: Dragons, castles, high-pitched screams, double kick drum.
badgeRootsDescription: You saw the farewell of an amazing band, right Dani?
badgeMoshPitDescription: Awarded on merit — you hit the floor and came back.
badgeCrowdsurferDescription: Awarded on merit — you flew over the crowd.
badgePartyMetalDescription: Saw both Party Metal bands — this festival was your party.
badgeDenimAndLeatherDescription: Four classic-metal sets, one uniform: vest, boots, attitude. You dressed for the gods and the gods showed up.
badgeKvltDescription: Four bands into the forest. The pack came back changed. Corpse paint isn't a look — it's a posture.
badgeWallOfDeathDescription: Two thrash sets, two walls, zero regrets. You ran straight at strangers and they ran back.
badgeVikingFurDescription: Four folk-metal sets, four braids, four horns of mead. The fur was already there. You just leaned into it.
badgeSlowAndLowDescription: Three doom sets. Three single notes. Your neck found gravity. You stayed.
badgeBreakdownBelieverDescription: Two breakdowns later your knees know everything your ears have forgotten. The pack respects the chug.
badgeDadRockRespectDescription: Def Leppard, Europe, the older guys. You stood with the dads. The denim was real. So were the riffs.
badgePitPupDescription: Two punk sets. Twice the bruises. The pack hates the system and loves the pit.
badgeLiveBeastDescription: Camping? For what? You were in the infield!
badgeGirlPowerDescription: Be aggressive and stand up for yourselves. Be kind but take no one's shit. — Nefeli Pischou - Absecense
badgeBbqKing2026Description: You made our lives better and our bellies full! We love you!
badgeJaggerKingDescription: You came and drank like a king. You deserved it!
badgeTotalKaput2026Description: You may not know what happened, but we know.
badgeMetalPlace2026Description: Set foot on the sacred beer garden in 2026 — you are real metal.
badgeBbqCrewDescription: When BBQ meets metal — the ultimate crew gathering!
badgeLostTogetherDescription: 15+ lost in the Infield at the same moment — at least they're not alone.
badgeWackenFirefightersDescription: Respect for traditions. I salute the volunteers who open and close the festival. 🤘
badgeGutalaxDescription: You survived the dirtiest set of the festival. Blame Osmar and go take a shower. 🤘
badgeHeavysaurusDescription: You roared along with the metal dinosaurs and felt like a kid again. 🤘
badgeWackingerRegularDescription: Have you drunk mead with your friends from Amon Amarth? 🤘
badgeWastelandWarriorDescription: Look who wants to become the next Mad Max! 🤘
badgeBullheadHeatDescription: The fire overlord of the holy land is making your heart warm. 🤘
badgeMelonDescription: You are a true vira-latas friend, you are not camping with us, but you are part of the pack! Woof!
badgeCivilEngineersOfDoomDescription: Built the camp before civilization existed.
badgeBeerforcementDescription: You brought the beer, backup tarp, and emotional support.
badgeCampfireVeteranDescription: Warm beers, grill smoke, and terrible decisions. Peak Wacken.
badgeSpawnPointInfieldDescription: No warm-up. You spawned directly into the chaos.
badgeWitchingHourDescription: Sleep is for the weak. The night is yours, the riffs are yours, the headache tomorrow is also yours.
badgeVampireDescription: The sun is your enemy. The grill is cold. You are not.
badgeSmallStageChampionDescription: You skipped the headliners and found the real gems. The underground bows to you.
badgeFullPackDescription: All vira-latas in camping at the same time. No one got lost. A miracle, basically.
badgeMassLostDescription: All vira-latas lost in the infield at the same time. The pack scattered. Send GPS.
badgeMedicDescription: Held the hair, fetched the water, walked the wounded home. The pack owes you one.
badgeJudasWitnessDescription: Breaking the law, breaking the law. You stood before the metal gods themselves.
badgeStageHopperDescription: Four stages, four vibes, zero loyalty. The pack runs free.
badgeOctopusDescription: All 8 stages conquered. You have no favorites, only victims.
badgeSmokeSignalsDescription: The pack always found you by the cloud. Wacken's air got a little spicier because of you.
badgeSpaceBrownieDescription: "It's just a brownie," they said. Two hours later you were debating reality with a tent pole.
badgeBeerMasterDescription: Liquid bread is a food group. You drank Wacken dry and asked for seconds. 🍺
badgeBeerHaterDescription: Surrounded by oceans of beer and you said "no thanks." Wine, shots, caipirinha — anything but that. 🥃
badgeCodeWizardsDescription: Three wizards, three apps, one pack. Built the magic so we could find, listen and pay each other. Without you, we'd just be lost dogs.
badgeSunSacrificeDescription: You forgot the sunscreen. Now you glow like a tomato in a denim vest. The pack respects the commitment.
badgeTacticalNapDescription: Mid-pit, mid-set, mid-conversation. Wherever sleep found you, you accepted it. Strategic withdrawal. The pack protected and laughed at you.
